description: The team at The Playground finishes their tactical preparations, and Fitz reports they have found the building matching Daisy's visions: the Transia Corporation facility. They solidify their plan, agreeing on a surgical strike with May as point, and remind themselves not to use comms to avoid Hydra interception. Tension is high as they prepare for possible confrontation with Charles' fate looming.

transcript.line: And shocker, the only way in is through their security office on the ground floor.
Transia Corporation, I know of it, but what would Malick want in there?
I used their nerve-wiring interface in your hand, sir. It's cutting edge, to say the least.
All right, May, surgical strike. And we agree, no comms on this.
And know we're coming if they really have a fortune-teller on hand.
And if you see Charles, do not go up to the roof, even if he...
